headline: SpaceX Stock Will Join The Nasdaq-100 Index On July 7
summary: Passive funds that track the Nasdaq-100 index will have to buy billions of dollars worth of SpaceX stock thanks to the fast-track inclusion.

headline: SpaceX just put every US carrier on notice
summary: Every industry runs on a comfortable order, right up until someone from outside decides the rules do not apply to them. In US wireless, that order has held for a long time. Three companies, Verizon (VZ), AT&T (T) and T-Mobile (TMUS), control almost every phone in your pocket. They build the ...
